1.label: Smoke Alarm
1.description: Devices in this group will receive a Basic Set or alarm frame when fire is detected. The frame type can be changed with parameter 5.

2.label: Tamper & Malfunction Alarm
2.description: Devices in this group will receive an alarm frame when tampering or a malfunction is detected.

paramInformation.label: Smoke Alarm Cancellation Delay
paramInformation.description: Time between the smoke disappearing and the device stopping to send the alarm signal

paramInformation.label: Alarm Acoustic and Visual Signals
paramInformation.description: Allows for deactivating the LED indicator and the acoustic alarm in case of detecting an alarm of any type

options.label: Acoustic alarm inactive, visual alarm active
Acoustic alarm active, visual alarm inactive

paramInformation.label: Alarm Frame Sent to 1st Association Group
paramInformation.description: Type of command frame sent once smoke is detected

paramInformation.label: Forced Level of Dimming Group 1
paramInformation.description: Forced level of dimming/opening when sending turn on/open commands to 1st association group devices

paramInformation.label: Temperature Report Interval
paramInformation.description: Time interval between consecutive temperature reports. Relevant for the battery powering mode only.

paramInformation.label: Temperature Report Hysteresis
paramInformation.description: The temperature report will only be sent if the temperature differs from the previously reported value by the hysteresis.

paramInformation.label: Alarm Broadcast
paramInformation.description: A value other than 0 means that alarms are sent in broadcast mode, i.e. to all devices within range.

options.label: Smoke alarm broadcast active, tamper broadcast inactive
Smoke alarm broadcast inactive, tamper broadcast active

paramInformation.label: Temperature Measurement Compensation
paramInformation.description: Value added to or deducted from the measured temperature to compensate the difference between air temperature and temperature measured at the ceiling level

paramInformation.label: Z-Wave Range Test Interval
paramInformation.description: Time period between consecutive Z-Wave network range tests. In battery powering mode the test is carried out at the wake up interval.

paramInformation.label: Temperature Alarm Threshold
paramInformation.description: Temperature above which the temperature alarm is sent. Changing this value may violate local safety regulations.

paramInformation.label: Black Box Sensitivity Level
paramInformation.description: Smoke and temperature levels above which the black box starts recording data

paramInformation.label: Malfunction Alarm Signaling Interval
paramInformation.description: Time interval in which the malfunction alarm, if detected, is repeated using visual and acoustic alarms

paramInformation.label: Temperature Alarm Signaling Interval
paramInformation.description: Time interval in which the temperature alarm, if detected, is repeated using visual and acoustic alarms

paramInformation.label: Lack of Z-Wave Range Alarm Signaling Interval
paramInformation.description: Time interval in which the lack of Z-Wave range alarm, if detected, is repeated using visual and acoustic alarms

paramInformation.label: Low Battery Alarm Signaling Interval
paramInformation.description: Time interval in which the low battery alarm, if detected, is repeated using visual and acoustic alarms

paramInformation.label: Temperature Measurement Compensation for Report
paramInformation.description: Consider temperature measurement compensation (parameter 73) when sending temperature report

options.label: Tamper alarm active, with cancellation option
Tamper alarm active, without cancellation option

metadata.inclusion: Connect the power source or install the battery, then quickly press the B-button located on the device's enclosure three times.
metadata.exclusion: Make sure the device is powered, then quickly press the B-button located on the device's enclosure three times.
metadata.reset:
1. Make sure the device is powered.
2. Press and hold the B-button for 3 seconds until the LED glows white.
3. Release the B-button.
4. Wait until the LED glows yellow, signaling the 4th menu level.
5. Briefly press the B-button to confirm.
